title: Huawei OptiXstar K572, Edge ONT & Dual-band router, WiFi 7
description: The Huawei OptiXstar K572 is a wireless router ideal for use with an ONT terminal, providing sufficient coverage and a stable wireless signal. It offers: 1x 2.5 GE port for connection to the service providerâs network. 1x 2.5 GE and 2x 1 GE ports for connecting user devices. Supports Wi-Fi 7 with MU-MIMO 2x2 on both 2.4 and 5 GHz frequencies (688 + 2882 Mb/s). Includes support for WPA3 , beamforming, band steering, and other advanced technologies.
